items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 25
items.note: For 'In the Spirit of Battle' — defeat Morty in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 25 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Dunsparce has outlived its use here. With Totodile you'll have Bite/Crunch; otherwise evolve Zubat into Golbat (Lv 22) for a super-effective hit on the Ghosts.
